title: Brazilian Keto Cheese Bread
description: A keto version of the classic Brazilian cheese bread, made with pao and indulgent cheese. Perfect for a low-carb snack.
instructions: Grate the pao and set aside.
Crumb the pao and mix with almond flour, xanthan gum, and salt in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and cheese.
Combine the egg mixture with the pao mixture and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a greased mini muffin tin.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
